name: Peanut Butter Chocolate Puffs
recipeInstructions:
Microwave Directions:
1. Spread the bottoms of 12 cookies with 1 teaspoon of peanut butter each.
2. Arrange the remaining 12 cookies, bottom side up, on a microwave-safe plate.
3. Top each cookie with a marshmallow.
4. Microwave on high for 10 to 20 seconds or until the marshmallows begin to puff.
5. Immediately top with the remaining cookies, peanut butter side down.
